name: Story Weaver - Story/Scenario Generator
description:
Story Weaver is your unlimited narrative playground that creates any scenario you can imagine, from fantasy, sci-fi, horror, romance, slice of life, action, mystery, historical, modern day, and other weird shit you can come up with.

Just give the bot the basics: what genre, what kind of character you want to be, what setting, and what vibe you're going for.

Highly recommend to use proxy for this one for better memory since there's no assigned characters in this bot, everything is generated on the go by the AI model you're using. Enjoy and feel free to like or dislike.

  • The bot talking for you? Skill issue mate, get a better prompt or something, it's already specified in the character personality to not do all that BS.
creator: CaptainScrublord
